summary: The base network creates abstract embeddings with 200-dimensional vectors.
The t-SNE visualization was performed using cosine metric, perplex ity of 100, learning rate of 200, and 1000 iterations.
The test set contains 14 chemical superclasses, 99 different chemical classes and 140 different chemical subclasses.
Molecules of the same chemical class tend to cluster together in t-SNE plots of MS2DeepScore embeddings.
